base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_palette_variants_example — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. 'Colors Example 1 2 3 4' — 4 palette variants: 1=normal suit, 2=Varia suit (stronger variant), 3/4=glow-frames during item pickup. Row used to demonstrate palette rotation used in-game. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'Colors Example 1 2 3 4' — 4 palette variants: 1=normal suit, 2=Varia suit (stronger variant), 3/4=glow-frames during item pickup. Row used to demonstrate palette rotation used in-game
